en_title: PlayStation's FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick Postponed Due to "Unexpected Production Delays"
cn_title: PlayStation FlexStrike无线格斗手柄因「意外生产延迟」推迟发布
subtitle: 新发售日期尚未确定
opus_summary: PlayStation因意外生产延迟推迟FlexStrike无线格斗摇杆，尚未公布新日期；这款兼容PS5与PC、售价199.99美元(约合人民币1356元)的首款官方格斗摇杆原定8月6日上市。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation has pushed back the launch of its FlexStrike wireless fight stick to an as-yet undetermined date due to a lag in production.
paragraphs.cn: 由于生产进度延误，PlayStation已将FlexStrike无线格斗摇杆的上市时间推迟至尚未确定的日期。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation revealed the news via a post on its official blog on July 14, 2026, explaining that “unexpected production delays” were to blame for the postponement.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation于2026年7月14日在官方博客发文公布这一消息，并解释称延期是由「意外生产延迟」造成的。

paragraphs.en: In their post, PlayStation stated that the FlexStrike will launch at a “later date” and promised to share another update with more details “soon.”
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation在文中表示，FlexStrike将在「稍后日期」上市，并承诺「很快」发布包含更多细节的后续更新。

paragraphs.en: “We’re working to ensure we deliver the best possible experience to our players with FlexStrike, so we’re taking extra time to put the finishing touches on the product. We apologize for this delay and look forward to bringing the FlexStrike experience to the community when it launches,” the company wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 该公司写道：「我们正在努力确保FlexStrike为玩家带来尽可能出色的体验，因此需要更多时间完成产品的最后打磨。我们为此次延期致歉，并期待在产品上市时把FlexStrike体验带给玩家社区。」

paragraphs.en: Players who already pre-ordered the FlexStrike will still be able to check their order status through the PlayStation website and will continue to receive updates about their order from the company — however, those who submitted an order through a third-party retailer will need to contact their source with any questions or concerns.
paragraphs.cn: 已预购FlexStrike的玩家仍可通过PlayStation网站查询订单状态，并会继续收到公司发出的订单更新；但通过第三方零售商下单的用户如有疑问或顾虑，需要联系相应零售商。

paragraphs.en: The FlexStrike fight stick was initially slated to launch on August 6, 2026, with pre-orders having opened on June 27. It marks the very first fight stick created by PlayStation, and is compatible with both the PS5 and PC, retailing for $199.99.
paragraphs.cn: FlexStrike格斗摇杆原定于2026年8月6日上市，预购已于6月27日开启。它是PlayStation打造的首款格斗摇杆，兼容PS5和PC，零售价199.99美元(约合人民币1356元)。

paragraphs.en: Specifically designed for tournament play with a rechargeable battery, the FlexStrike was initially met with cautious positivity by the broader fighting game community; however, following PlayStation’s recent decision to eschew physical games in favor of digital downloads, players from all genres are now criticizing the brand following this latest update for its physical hardware and peripherals.
paragraphs.cn: FlexStrike专为赛事竞技设计并配备充电电池，起初在更广泛的格斗游戏社区中获得了谨慎的积极评价；不过，PlayStation最近决定放弃实体游戏、转向数字下载后，来自各类游戏的玩家如今又因这次实体硬件及外设更新而批评该品牌。
